calendar.matters:
ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Hearing For Filing Of A Petition For Final Distribution Or A Petition For Approval Of Report On Status Of Administration
Off Calendar Oct-21-2025 Off Calendar

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Accounting, Report, Fees, Final Distribution
Off Calendar Jun-24-2025 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
The following matters were heard: PES-24-307438 Estate of Reisel Berger and PES-25-308321 Sanina Narayan .

Appearances: Kale Heiman appeared via zoom for Neetan Narayan (petitioner).

Counsel stated that her client would like to proceed with the 3411 petition to put the funds into a blocked account until the minor turns 18.

Both petitions are taken under submission with the intent to grant.

Judge: Stephen Murphy. Clerk: A. Datt. Deputy: Thompson. Not reported

Petition For Order Directing Investment Of Funds [Probate Code 3413]
Off Calendar Apr-02-2025 Off Calendar

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Sep-17-2024 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances: Kale Heiman appeared via zoom for Neetan Narayan (petitioner).

This matter was put on for hearing with no appearance required for the purpose of admitting the will. There being no objections, the Court granted the Petition for Probate of Will and for Letters Testamentary. The will dated January 22, 2022 is admitted to probate. Neetan Narayan is appointed as the Administrator of the estate with full authority. Bond is set at $550,000.00. Order for the same signed in open Court. Status on close of estate is set for October 21, 2025 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. If either a petition for final distribution, or a petition for approval of report on status on administration is filed two weeks prior to the hearing date, the status hearing will go off calendar. Michael Kasolas is appointed Probate Referee.

Judge: Stephen Murphy Clerk: A. Datt. Deputy: Ng. Not reported.

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Jul-23-2024 Continued To Sep-17-24 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
